name_en: SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.
